'''Jiyam Solo''' was a professional [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]] impersonator around [[40 ABY/Legends|40 ABY]]. He changed his name to better suit the part, and his voice was deeper than the original's.

==Appearances==
*''[[Legacy of the Force: Betrayal]]'' {{1st}}
